name: @constellation-network/openclaw-audit-plugin
description: Tamper-evident audit trail with Digital Evidence anchoring for AI coding agent activity

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file for audit storage

localRetentionDays.description: Auto-delete local events after N days (default: 365)

localMaxSizeMb.description: Prune oldest events when DB exceeds this size in MB (default: 500)

notificationWebhook.description: Webhook URL for Slack, Discord, or generic notifications on config changes and integrity violations

openclawDir.description: Path to the OpenClaw configuration directory (default: ~/.openclaw)

deApiKey.description: Digital Evidence API key for audit trail anchoring

deEnv.description: Digital Evidence network environment (default: mainnet). 'test' requires the DE_TEST_URL environment variable pointing at a loopback URL; used for local development only.

deOrgId.description: Digital Evidence organization ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deTenantId.description: Digital Evidence tenant ID (UUID) for fingerprint submission

deSigningKey.description: SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for signing fingerprints. If omitted, an ephemeral key is generated.

deWalletKeyFile.description: Path to file containing a SECP256K1 private key (64-char hex) for wallet-based x402 payment auth. Derives orgId and tenantId from wallet address automatically.

deEventThreshold.description: Number of events to accumulate before anchoring to DE (default: 100)

deTimerMinEvents.description: Minimum events required to anchor on a timer tick (default: 1, clamped to >= 1)

deIntervalMs.description: Maximum time between DE anchoring attempts in milliseconds (default: 300000)

redactPromptText.description: Replace prompt/message content with sha256 hash before storing (default: false)

redactToolArgs.description: Replace tool-call arguments with sha256 hash before storing (default: false)

fileWatchPatterns.description: Glob patterns for files to watch for changes (e.g. ["src/**/*.ts", "config/*.json"])

fileWatchIntervalMs.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for file watching when fileWatchUsePolling is true (default: 1000)

fileWatchIgnorePatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from file watching (e.g. ["**/node_modules/**", "**/.git/**"])

fileWatchUsePolling.description: Use polling instead of native fs events for file watching (default: false). Enable for network mounts.

gatewayUrl.description: swarm-deck gateway base URL to publish audit events to (e.g. https://gateway.example.com). Events are POSTed to <gatewayUrl>/admin/audit/ingest. Leave unset to disable gateway publishing.

gatewayApiKey.description: swarm-deck gateway API key (sk-gw-...) sent in the X-Gateway-Api-Key header. Required when gatewayUrl is set.

gatewayBatchSize.description: Maximum number of events per POST batch (default: 50)

gatewayIntervalMs.description: Maximum time between gateway POST attempts in milliseconds (default: 30000)

gatewayTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for gateway POST requests in milliseconds (default: 15000)

gatewayEnabled.description: Explicit on/off switch for gateway publishing (default: true when gatewayUrl + gatewayApiKey are both set)
